name: CaseFiles
short: VHS Detectives — stamp community findings to award points and ranks.
description: A community-engagement bot for a VHS tape archive. One case is live at a time in a single channel: the admin opens a mystery or post-stream case, the community replies with leads, and the admin reacts with a stamp emoji to confirm a finding — which awards the author points, records it on the case card, and bumps their rank. Nothing counts until it's stamped. v1 is the Discord loop only; rank roles, vault/Gitea notes, and the monthly shoutout come later.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord user IDs together with the content of messages the admin stamps as confirmed findings, plus the points and rank each user has earned. Submitted tape images are stored in the cog's data folder. A user's stamped contributions are removed on a Red data-deletion request.
install_msg: VHS Detectives loaded. Set the case channel (`[p]caseset channel #channel`), then open a case with `/case mystery` or `/case stream`. Stamp good replies with 💡/🔍/🏆 to award points. (Slash commands may need a one-time `[p]slash sync`.)
